name: NASA GIBS
description: NASA Global Imagery Browse Services for satellite imagery layers.

metadata.commercial_notes: NASA imagery requires attribution and service-aware usage.

name: OpenAQ
description: OpenAQ air quality station observations and measurements.

metadata.commercial_notes: Coverage is uneven and source licenses vary by station.

name: PVGIS
description: PVGIS solar irradiation and photovoltaic potential estimates.

metadata.commercial_notes: PVGIS results are generally reusable; attribution recommended.

name: EEA
description: European Environment Agency thematic map overlays.

metadata.commercial_notes: EU-focused institutional datasets; service shape may change.

name: ESA
description: European Space Agency WorldCover land use maps.

name: TomTom
description: TomTom map and traffic tiles (API key required).

metadata.commercial_notes: Commercial use allowed under TomTom terms.

name: Geoapify
description: Geoapify basemap and amenities overlays (API key required).

metadata.commercial_notes: Free tier supports limited commercial use with attribution.
